checklistName: Post PR223 Main Sync Local Verification Checklist
mainSyncPolicy: After PR #223 merge, local main must be updated with git switch main, git pull origin main, and git status.
localVerificationPolicy: Open private-local.html manually and verify local display without adding launcher scripts.
nextPhaseGatePolicy: Do not start the next implementation until main is clean and the local entry page is visually checked.
nextRecommendedStep: Confirm main is updated and clean, open private-local.html manually, then proceed only after stable local display confirmation.
